channel.title: redis on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in redis on Frank Huang

item.title: Redis command and data structure note
item.description: ConnectionResetError: [Errno 54] Connection reset by peer basic operation set <key> <value> type <key>: check the type of an object List Linked list under the hood lpush lpop lrange: show all elements inside a specified key. Can not apply on sorted collections. ltrim key <start> <end>: only keep the elements in between start index to end index blpop key <timeout>: block wait for timeout seconds. llen: length Hashes hmset key field value [key value .
